mapper.sql: SELECT b.isbn, b.cover, b.name, b.intro, b.author, p.name AS press_name, b.publish_time, c.name AS category_name, b.price, s.current_stock FROM lib_book AS b LEFT JOIN lib_stock AS s ON s.isbn = b.isbn LEFT JOIN lib_publish AS p ON p.id = b.press_id LEFT JOIN lib_category AS c ON c.id = b.category_id

SELECT b.isbn, b.cover, b.name, b.intro, b.author, b.press_id, p.name AS press_name, b.publish_time, b.category_id, b.price, c.name AS category_name, s.stock, s.current_stock, s.create_time, s.update_time FROM lib_book AS b LEFT JOIN lib_stock AS s ON s.isbn = b.isbn LEFT JOIN lib_publish AS p ON p.id = b.press_id LEFT JOIN lib_category AS c ON c.id = b.category_id

if.test: queryParams.field != null and queryParams.field != '' and queryParams.keyword != null and queryParams.keyword != ''

mapper.update: UPDATE lib_stock SET stock = stock + #{amount}, current_stock = current_stock + #{amount}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE isbn = #{isbn}
UPDATE lib_stock SET current_stock = current_stock + #{amount}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE isbn = #{isbn}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lib_stock (isbn, stock, current_stock, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{isbn}, #{amount}, #{amount}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE stock = stock + VALUES(stock), current_stock = current_stock + VALUES(current_stock), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
